item2_roster.note: Full roster extracted in A1 with role, name, and start date. 7 footnotes with prior employment history for external hires.

items_9_through_16_burdens.burden: Cross-reference table of 24 obligation categories linking to specific FA sections and FDD items. Key: site selection by McDonald's, mandatory compliance with standards/manual, advertising min 4%, indemnification, owner full-time participation, records/reports, inspections/audits, transfer restrictions, noncompete.

McDonald's typically offers no direct financing. Guaranteed loans from Bank of America available for remodeling, acquisitions, BFL option exercises. SOFR+3.10%, 3-5 year term, 7-year amortization. Personal and spousal guarantee required. Jury waiver. Cross-default to FA. OAPA waiver of claims. Guarantee fee 1.50%.

Pre-opening: McDonald's constructs premises, prescribes specs, provides training. Operational: periodic consulting, O&T Manual, communications. Advertising: no McDonald's fund, min 4% of GS, OPNAD 2.25%. Computer Systems: Sesame POS $150K-$250K, annual tech fees ~$10.4K+, unlimited upgrade frequency, McDonald's unlimited data access. Training: 6mo-2yr Candidate Development Program, HU in Chicago, must complete before signing. Site selection: McDonald's selects all sites.
No exclusive territory. No protected area. McDonald's may establish competing outlets at any time. Reserves all channel rights. McCafe in supermarkets/e-commerce.

Non-exclusive right to use Marks (Golden Arches, McDonald's, combined). Marks owned by Restaurant Brands LLC, licensed to McDonald's USA. Cannot use marks outside restaurant or in company name. No obligation for McDonald's to protect against trademark claims.

No patents. Copyrights in O&T Manual, menus, advertising. Trade secrets: extensive list including recipes, specs, financial info. Confidentiality of Financial Information required. Unauthorized use = civil/criminal prosecution + termination.
Full time and best efforts. Personal on-premises supervision. Must devote full time to restaurant business.

Only McDonald's-authorized products. Only prescribed equipment, packaging, ingredients, methods. McDonald's has unlimited right to add/delete/change products. No customer restrictions but must operate only at franchised location.

item18.note: No public figures. McDonald's does not use any public figure to promote its franchise. One-line item.
